---
title: "The Ven. Canon William Emery"
---

## The Ven. Canon William Emery

**Dates:** (1825–1910)

### Description

Archdeacon of Ely

### Biography

He became Archdeacon of Ely in 1864 and was prominent in the Church Congress movement. He married (1865) [[person:2106]Fanny Maria Brady].

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 1st 1892
- Letter from Sep 25, 1886

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
